message:
fix: address round 6 review issues — pending waiter rejection, /clear race, idleLoop subscribe

- Refactor resultResolvers to PendingWaiter struct with { resolve, reject, timer }
- clearHandles() now rejects all pending waitAgent promises immediately
  instead of letting them hang for up to 15 minutes
- Chain clearHandles().then(updateSessionId()) in /clear handler to
  eliminate race between concurrent fire-and-forget promises
- Update spawnerReady in /clear so submitGoal awaits the reset
- Restructure idleLoop to await bus.subscribe before entering idle
  promise, eliminating the floating promise
- Add test: clearHandles rejects pending waiters promptly (<2s)
- Update test: /clear verifies sequential call ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
